justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all temporal expressions provided by the user.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent only reported unavailability and asked the user to pick a new time without offering options.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed information and did not ask for redundant information.
justifications.customer_experience: The experience was workable, but the agent's inability to suggest alternative times made it slightly tiring.
justifications.recovery_quality: The agent recovered by asking the user for a new time, but did not offer any alternatives or expand the search intelligently.
